name: squad
description: Multi-agent advisory squad workflow for implementing or reviewing code changes. Two modes — implement (default) runs classify → score risk → select agents → planner → Gate 1 → advisory squad → Gate 2 → implementer → consolidator → verdict; review runs advisory-only on an existing diff/branch/PR/commit. Dispatches named subagents (architect, dba, developer, reviewer, security, qa, tech-lead-planner, tech-lead-consolidator, product-owner); each scores its dimension 0-100 and the consolidator weights them into a rubric scorecard with APPROVED/CHANGES_REQUIRED/REJECTED verdict. Triggers: "run the squad", "advisory review", "implement with squad", "code review by specialists", "review this PR", "review my diff", "review my branch", "implement this feature", "build this with the squad", "/squad:implement", "/squad:review". Example: "/squad:implement --normal add OAuth login flow" or "/squad:review --deep main..feature/auth-rewrite". For decision-only (no code yet), use /brainstorm. For plan stress-test, use /squad:grillme.
